name: hud_ui_background_bind_buttons_node_to_widget_by_name
description: HudUiBackground::BindButtonsNodeToWidgetByName looks up BUTTONS/<name>, dispatches widget LoadFromZrd and PostLoadFromZrd, and returns false.
known_limits: VC6 12.00.8168 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare for 0x4ba070 fails with 11 unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 67 bytes and the VC object body is 80 bytes with 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The source now uses pointer-to-member dispatch for slots 0x7c and 0x80 so VC6 emits the retail thiscall shape (mov ecx, esi; call [ftable+slot]) instead of stack-passing self. Remaining drift is success-path epilogue duplication: VC emits an early xor/pop/retn before the common false-return block, while retail pops esi and falls through to the common xor al,al epilogue.

The focused smoke covers the BUTTONS/<name> lookup, LoadFromZrd owner argument, PostLoadFromZrd dispatch, false return, missing-name skip, and the exact wrapper path through HudUiBackground::BindWidgetByName.
